# Survey {#sec-survey}

If you haven't read the sections under
["Overview"](/overview/syllabus.qmd) (starting at @sec-syllabus) and
done the ["Pre-workshop tasks"](/pre-workshop/overview.qmd) (starting at
@sec-pre-workshop), **please do that before doing the survey**. There
are some questions in the survey that ask about these sections, such as
in ["Is this workshop for you?"](/overview/is-this-for-you.qmd) (in
@sec-is-this-for-you) and the
[Code of Conduct](/pre-workshop/code-of-conduct.qmd) (in
@sec-code-of-conduct), as well as to copy and paste output from some R
functions into the survey. To remind you, the functions for the survey
are:

```r
r3::check_setup()
r3::check_project_setup_intermediate()
```

You're almost done! Please fill out the pre-workshop survey to finish
this section:

[Pre-workshop survey :tada:]({{< meta surveys.pre-workshop >}}){.btn
.btn-primary role="button"}

See you at the workshop! :wave:
